scene: Byte is in an ecstatic coding flow during a sunny Chicago afternoon.

subjects.description: Gangly teen Byte, big expressive eyes, ecstatic expression, typing at the oversized laptop.
Desk, oversized laptop, trophy shelf above with golden 10-day trophy and green plant, Chicago skyline window.

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: bright warm afternoon golden light streaming through the window
background: tidy desk, trophy shelf with one golden trophy on the left and one green plant on the right, window showing Chicago skyline
composition: medium shot, Byte centered at desk
